notes: Solid, feature-complete Breakout implementation with particles, trail, audio, attract mode, and progressive difficulty; minor issue with drawBricks logic on title screen (draws attract bricks twice) and the aim arrow direction calculation is slightly off, but overall plays very well.
Feature-complete and polished for Breakout, but mouse aim is effectively absent, some collision/trajectory behavior is approximate, and a few UI/control choices keep it short of excellent.
